scripts.format: prettier --write src test vitest.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src test vitest.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json wrangler.jsonc .github/workflows/ci.yml
scripts.test: npm run test:probe && npm run test:worker
scripts.check: npm run types:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run deploy:dry-run
